message:
✨ Expand card width defaults for all card types

Add comprehensive default sizes for all card types:
- Full-width (12 cols): cluster_resource_tree
- Extra-wide (8 cols): tables with many columns (security, rbac, helm diffs)
- Wide (6 cols): time series, events, medium tables
- Standard (4 cols): status cards, gauges, donut charts

This improves the initial layout when adding cards to dashboards.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -869,20 +869,75 @@ function mapVisualizationToCardType(visualization: string, type: string): string

 function getDefaultCardSize(cardType: string): { w: number; h: number } {
-  const largeSizeCards: Record<string, { w: number; h: number }> = {

     cluster_resource_tree: { w: 12, h: 6 },
-    // Wide cards
-    event_stream: { w: 6, h: 3 },

 function getDemoCards(): Card[] {
